items.caption: A bookmark with a playful design featuring a cartoon pig character. the bookmark is placed on an open book, which is displaying text on its pages. the text on the bookmark reads "just a minute... this book's so interesting..." with a cartoon pig character peeking over the top of the bookmark, as if it's reading the book. the book's pages are visible, but the text is not legible in the image. the bookmark has a pattern of purple flowers and green leaves. the background is neutral, focusing the viewer's attention on the bookmark and the book.
